title: Studio Technical Support Crew
description:
AP Media is a creative media tech company that represents a new multi-disciplinary intersection point in the industry. At a time when audiences are craving for more immersive digital content, we are here to provide the technical expertise, experimental thinking and marketing innovation brands need to thrive.

We aim to make futurealistic experiences across a spectrum of domains, from real-time 3D set mapping, virtual and hybrid activations to interactive live streaming, immersive multimedia and experiential marketing.

We want to make these experiences accessible to everyone. To do that, we help connect the dots across six key dimensions for new brand opportunities you can create today.

We are looking for an open-minded, proactive, resourceful and dynamic individual, to join as a Virtual Production Camera Technician

Job Description:

• Set up, configure, operate, and perform preventive maintenance on all studio and virtual production equipment, including cameras, LED/VP processing units, tracking systems, video routers, and AV infrastructure, ensuring every system is production-ready and functioning reliably.

• Troubleshoot camera and imaging equipment and provide clear technical reports to the Studio Manager and manufacturers to support timely issue resolution and minimise downtime.

• Maintain system performance by updating firmware and software across all devices and ensuring compatibility with real-time production workflows.

• Ensure that all technical equipment meets operational and safety standards, with minimal disruption to studio activities and production schedules.

• Read, interpret, and design camera and signal-flow diagrams, supporting clear and efficient routing for both physical and virtual production environments.

• Manage and route video signals, including split camera feeds, genlock, timecode, and data lines, ensuring synchronised and stable connections during shoots.

• Apply strong knowledge of professional video standards, including HD-SDI, DisplayPort, HDMI, RAW workflows, colour metadata, and data-wrangling practices used in virtual production and broadcast pipelines.

• Maintain and support Virtual Production systems, including tracking objects, markers, cabling, power management, and full AV signal flow across the LED volume.

• Assist the camera crew with calibration workflows, including lens calibration, spatial calibration, and mounting of virtual production tracking hardware on set.

• Troubleshoot video feeds, tracking stability, and calibration issues in collaboration with the Virtual Production team to maintain accurate real-time rendering and scene playback.

• Communicate changeover updates, camera configuration changes, and system status to the Virtual Production team to ensure smooth transitions and operational clarity.

• Continuously develop skills and stay updated on new technologies, maintaining a forward-thinking and adaptable approach to evolving industry tools and workflows.

• Proficient in video editing, supporting quick reviews, technical tests, and content preparation when required.

postedCompany.description: As one of ASEAN’s leading media and integrated marketing agency, AP Media is committed to go above and beyond as the partner of choice for enterprises. We specialise in interactive media, video content and business consultancy to bring you campaigns that will excite, engage and inspire.
postedCompany.name: AP MEDIA PTE. LTD.
